query:
-- Check waConversationId distribution
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN waConversationId IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'SET' END as has_conv_id,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM messages
GROUP BY has_conv_id;

-- Check a specific conversation's messages
SELECT m.id, m.waConversationId, m.remoteJid, m.sessionId, m.fromMe, m.content, m.timestamp, m.messageType
FROM messages m
WHERE m.sessionId = 'crm-150002-150001' AND m.remoteJid = '5511930812692@s.whatsapp.net'
ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC
LIMIT 5;
